import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state):
    """Local grid patch observation - fundamentally different approach."""
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    agent_pos = state.agent.position
    
    # Extract 5x5 patch around agent (2 cells in each direction)
    patch_size = 5
    half_patch = 2
    
    # Initialize patch with walls (out of bounds = wall)
    patch = jnp.full((patch_size, patch_size), 2.0, dtype=jnp.float32)  # WALL = 2
    
    # Fill in actual grid values where they exist
    for dy in range(-half_patch, half_patch + 1):
        for dx in range(-half_patch, half_patch + 1):
            grid_y = agent_pos[0] + dy
            grid_x = agent_pos[1] + dx
            
            # Check if position is within grid bounds
            in_bounds = ((grid_y >= 0) & (grid_y < H) & (grid_x >= 0) & (grid_x < W))
            
            patch_y = dy + half_patch
            patch_x = dx + half_patch
            
            tile_value = jax.lax.select(
                in_bounds,
                state.grid[grid_y, grid_x, 0].astype(jnp.float32),
                2.0  # WALL for out of bounds
            )
            
            patch = patch.at[patch_y, patch_x].set(tile_value)
    
    # Normalize tile IDs to [0, 1] range
    patch_normalized = patch / 12.0  # Max tile ID is 12
    
    # Agent direction as one-hot
    dir_onehot = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4, dtype=jnp.float32)
    
    # Flatten patch and combine with direction
    # 25 patch features + 4 direction features = 29 total (much smaller than previous approaches)
    observation = jnp.concatenate([
        patch_normalized.flatten(),  # 25 elements: local spatial information
        dir_onehot                   # 4 elements: which way am I facing
    ])
    
    return observation

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    """Simplified reward: just Manhattan distance shaping."""
    # Find goal position
    goal_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == 6)
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H, dtype=jnp.float32)
    xs = jnp.arange(W, dtype=jnp.float32)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    
    goal_count = jnp.maximum(jnp.sum(goal_mask), 1.0)
    goal_y = jnp.sum(yy * goal_mask) / goal_count
    goal_x = jnp.sum(xx * goal_mask) / goal_count
    
    # Manhattan distance progress
    prev_pos = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    curr_pos = next_state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    
    prev_dist = jnp.abs(prev_pos[0] - goal_y) + jnp.abs(prev_pos[1] - goal_x)
    curr_dist = jnp.abs(curr_pos[0] - goal_y) + jnp.abs(curr_pos[1] - goal_x)
    
    # Pure distance improvement - no other terms to avoid confusion
    reward = prev_dist - curr_dist
    
    return reward.astype(jnp.float32)
